Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x05E1 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Black Magic (J1).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4460 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Black Magic (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $4000 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Copies 1024 bytes of data from $4050 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 3. Sets the correct bitmap settings 4. Sets the correct border, screen and sprite colours by copying data from $4450 to $D020-$D02E (colour RAM is restored separately) 5. And finally jumps to the entry point at $05E1 (it couldn't use RTS because of the stack being cleared)
Note: the space used at $4000 overwrites the left over loading screen.
